meaning: n.酪饼,(由干酪,蛋和糖等混合后焙制而成)半裸体或露出曲线美的女人照片
examples: The cheesecake smells so good that I can't wait to eat it.
The brownie and pineapple cheesecake have a marginal value, because their value is at the limit of their sign constraints.
Dave Luz is the regional manager for the eight Cheesecake Factories in the Boston area.
In the spot, a woman agonizes over whether to eat a slice of raspberry cheesecake.
